text:
On a > 1000055 system (drill instead of dig), check_dns is still not installed
(SUB_DNS="@comment ")

Port maintainer (demon@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_11 (mode: change, diff: SVN)

Fix: Remove SUB_DNS... patch attached.
How-To-Repeat: Install this port on a 10.x system, check_dns is not here although the Makefile has logic for this case.
